proposals.label: Preview lab status contract read
proposals.inputSummary: No runtime input; static host status metadata only.
proposals.outputPolicy: Bounded status JSON with conservative evidence markers.
limitations: Proposal listing does not run the status command.
Status output does not claim hardware, timing, inference, or throughput evidence.

proposals.label: Preview theme token contract read
proposals.inputSummary: No runtime input; semantic theme-token metadata only.
proposals.outputPolicy: Bounded theme-token JSON with named presets.
limitations: Proposal listing does not run the theme command.
Theme tokens are experimental semantic slots.

proposals.label: Preview workflow descriptor catalog read
proposals.inputSummary: No runtime input; descriptor-only metadata only.
proposals.outputPolicy: Bounded descriptor JSON with no execution state.
limitations: Proposal listing does not run the workflows command.
Descriptor metadata does not implement an MCP runtime.

proposals.label: Preview workflow proposal catalog read
proposals.inputSummary: No runtime input; proposal-only metadata only.
proposals.outputPolicy: Bounded proposal JSON with no execution state.
limitations: Proposal listing does not run the workflow-proposals command.
Proposal metadata does not implement a runner.

proposals.label: Preview SystemVerilog shape diagnostics
proposals.inputSummary: Requires one approved local SystemVerilog file path in a later boundary.
proposals.outputPolicy: Bounded diagnostics JSON; no semantic verification or hardware run.
limitations: Proposal listing does not read files.
Any future run must approve the file input before execution.

proposals.label: Preview trace import summary
proposals.inputSummary: Would require an approved local trace file in a later boundary.
proposals.outputPolicy: Future output should be summary-only trace metadata.
limitations: No trace is loaded by proposal listing.
No raw trace payload crosses this proposal boundary.

proposals.label: Preview verification report summary
proposals.inputSummary: Would require an approved report source in a later boundary.
proposals.outputPolicy: Future output should be summary-only report metadata.
limitations: No verification script is launched by proposal listing.
No timing closure or hardware result is claimed.
Workflow proposals are previews only and never execute workflows.
Fixed argument previews are token arrays, not raw shell strings.
A separate approval boundary is required before any future run.
No hardware, provider, network, MCP, launcher, or IDE runtime is invoked.
The FPGA repo is not required and is not touched by proposal listing.
